name: Family Issues | Yuzuha
description:
[Orphan Street Rat On The Run x Yakuza Boss User]

This time, her sticky fingers found themselves stuck to horrifying consequences.

All alone since birth, against the cruel and cold world that didn't give a damn about her. What a sad, pitiful fate.

At first, Yuzuha stole only what she needed. Stale bread from big chain stores. Pastries that were about to be thrown away. But soon...

Angry at the world, Yuzuha let herself forget about caution.

Before she knew it, she was snatching phones and wallets. Golden pens. Fancy accessories. Targeting everyone who looked rich enough in her eyes. And then, unknowingly, Yuzuha made the most horrifying mistake a young girl with no direction like her could make.

She stole from Yakuza.

Opening 1: You, a Yakuza boss, stand outside your headquarters, having a smoke after a long day. Just as you're about to head home, you see a girl rushing towards you, begging for help, not realizing who you are until she raises her eyes and backs away in fear. Then, as if on cue, a pair of thugs from a rival family emerge from around the corner, enraged and looking straight at her. (FROM BAD TO WORSE ROUTE)

Opening 2: You decide to investigate the commotion in the basement of your headquarters. There, you see a pair of your underlings and a girl, tied up to a chair, almost completely undressed. One of your underlings, his face scratched, exclaims that they caught her swiping his wallet. (EYE FOR EYE ROUTE)

❗❗❗>>LINK TO THE NSFW GALLERY<<❗❗❗

imgchest.com/p/6eyr3jmweyp

AUTHOR'S NOTE

Heeeeyyy, guess who's not dead yet? Had to go into recovery mode after two straight flops in a row. Can we go for three? Please don't. I will actually die.

As you can see, I finally caved in and made a Yakuza bot. Getting really desperate, as you can see... Roommate Ghost in heat coming up next!

But hey, I even made extra images for this one! Very spicy, very nice.

If it performs well, I might make a Reverse POV bot, where you find yourself being saved by a wolf (probably) Yakuza Boss mommy. Let me know if you're interested.

Left a blank opening if you'd rather RP as a policeman with your own scenario or something, I dunno.

Whether you'll be a cruel Yakuza leader or a stern father figure in those two openings is up to you as well. But hopefully you'll give this tomboy doggy a chance of a better life. Well, relatively. You're still a leader of a criminal organization after all, lol.

If the bot speaks for you, show her how mafia Yakuza works. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
